headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies secured a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win. The Detroit Tigers took down the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, while the Cincinnati Reds outlasted the Cleveland Guardians 7-6.

Injuries continue to impact teams across the league. The San Francisco Giants placed Heliot Ramos on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The Los Angeles Angels placed Ben Joyce on the 60-day injured list with right shoulder inflammation. Trevor Story was placed on the 10-day injured list by the Boston Red Sox, retroactive to May 15, 2026, due to a sports hernia. Other notable injuries include Clay Holmes (New York Mets), Max Fried (New York Yankees), Matt Strahm (Kansas City Royals), Matt Waldron (San Diego Padres), and Blake Snell (Los Angeles Dodgers).

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Chicago White Sox acquired Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for LHP Jackson Nove. The Athletics traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for 2B Alika Williams and RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics for cash.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a narrow victory. Zack Littell led the Nationals' pitching effort, earning the win with 5.0 innings pitched and 3 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Impact players from both teams included Yohendrick Piñango, Daulton Varsho, Kevin McGonigle, and Matt Vierling.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, handing the Royals their loss. Impact hitters for the Cardinals included Jac Caglianone, Nathan Church, and Victor Scott II.

top_news.title: **Ramos Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants left fielder Heliot Ramos has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The injury occurred on May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. This move adds depth to the White Sox outfield.
